expectations.text: The review identifies that the catch block sends no HTTP response to the client
expectations.evidence: Lines 11-12: 'the catch block catches errors from processPayment and logs them using console.error, but it never sends an HTTP response back to the client'

expectations.text: The review explains the consequence (client request hangs or times out)
expectations.evidence: Line 12: 'The client's connection will hang indefinitely until it times out'

expectations.text: The review suggests adding a res.status(500) error response in the catch block
expectations.evidence: Lines 14-19: code example showing res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Payment processing failed.' })

claims.claim: The review also identified missing input validation
claims.evidence: Lines 21-25 cover missing input validation warning
